basic_details.job_title: RITES Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: RITES Limited Assistant Manager (HR) Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. RG/30-R1/25 on the official website https://www.rites.com. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the RITES Assistant Manager (HR) Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.raw: Online Application Start Date: 25 June 2026 Last Date for Submission & Fee Payment: 22 July 2026

qualification.details: Qualification: MBA/PGDBA/PGDBM/PGDM/PGDHRM or equivalent with specialization in HR/Personnel Management/Industrial Relations/Labour Welfare. Experience: Minimum 2 years post-qualification in Human Resource Management areas. Age Limit (as on 22 July 2026): Maximum 32 years. Relaxation as per rules for reserved categories/PwBD.

vacancy_details.details: Post: Assistant Manager (HR) Total Posts: 3 (UR-02, EWS-01) PwBD Reservation: 2 posts (horizontal) – Cat-a: 1, Cat-b: 1

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: INR 40,000 - 1,40,000 Additional benefits include DA, allowances, PRP, Medical, HRA, PF, Gratuity etc.

selection_process: Written Test (60% weightage) Interview (40% weightage) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Apply online through RITES website www.rites.com.
Upload all required documents and pay application fee.
Keep printout of application for future reference.
important_instructions: Probation period of 1 year. Posting anywhere in India/abroad as per requirement. Age, qualification & experience reckoned as on 22.07.2026.

content_sections.text: Apply online through RITES website www.rites.com . Upload all required documents and pay application fee. Submit before 22 July 2026. Keep printout of application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RITES Assistant Manager (HR) post?
faq.answer: The last date for online application and fee payment is 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in RITES HR recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Total 3 vacancies (UR-02, EWS-01) with 2 posts reserved for PwBD.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Assistant Manager (HR) in RITES?
faq.answer: Pay scale of INR 40,000 - 1,40,000 plus other benefits.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for RITES Assistant Manager (HR) post?
faq.answer: Maximum 32 years as on 22.07.2026 (relaxation as per rules).

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum experience required for RITES HR position?
faq.answer: Minimum 2 years post-qualification experience in Human Resource Management.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification for RITES Assistant Manager (HR)?
faq.answer: MBA/PGDBA/PGDM/PGDHRM or equivalent with specialization in HR.
